original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Amelia, Isabella, Daniel, and David. As Amelia put it, "Isabella is a knight if and only if Amelia is a knight". Isabella remarked, "Amelia is a knight if and only if David is a knave". "David is a knave if and only if Daniel is a knight," Daniel claimed. David was heard saying, "Daniel is a knave if and only if Isabella is a knave". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
